Name: Hyprstream Media
Author: danmaxis
Description: A visual now-playing surface for Stream Deck on Linux. Reads MPRIS (playerctl) to composite live album art under the transport glyph and mirror playback state on the key — play/pause, next, previous. Unlike transport-only plugins, the key shows the current cover for the focused player.

Actions.Name: Media Control
Actions.Tooltip: Tap to control the active MPRIS media player (Spotify, browsers, mpv, VLC, etc.) via playerctl. Modes: play-pause / next / previous. The play-pause icon reflects whether something is currently playing (▶ when paused, ❚❚ when playing) and updates within ~one second of state changes from anywhere. With Show Album Art enabled, local file:// art is composited under the glyph; HTTPS art (Spotify/Tidal) loads when 'Allow remote fetch' is also on. Requires: playerctl (pacman -S playerctl).

Actions.Name: Now Playing → OBS
Actions.Tooltip: Mirror the current MPRIS track into an OBS text source (and optionally an image source for album art) over obs-websocket v5 — the overlay updates itself on every track change, replacing the playerctl→systemd→text-file scripts DJs hand-roll. The key shows the current cover + track and an OBS badge that turns green when connected; press to force a re-push. Template placeholders: {artist}, {title}, {album}. Requires: playerctl and OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.

Actions.Name: Auto-Frame (Focus)
Actions.Tooltip: Auto-crop the focused Hyprland window into a fixed region of an OBS scene, live-following as you tab between editor/terminal/browser. Set up ONE PipeWire/Screen-Capture source of your coding monitor in a scene (one-time Wayland portal grant) and name it here; the plugin reads window+monitor geometry from Hyprland and drives OBS via SetSceneItemTransform. Press to toggle Follow ↔ Pin (lock the current window). Requires: Hyprland + OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.

Actions.Name: Privacy Guard
Actions.Tooltip: Protect against leaking secrets on stream: when a window matching your blocklist (password manager, .env/secrets, DMs, mail, banking) gains focus in Hyprland, instantly hide the content source or cut OBS to a privacy scene — restoring when focus leaves. The key is also a manual panic cut. Reacts from the compositor focus signal, faster than a human. Requires: Hyprland + OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.

Actions.Name: Zoom Spotlight
Actions.Tooltip: Momentary spotlight zoom: press to smoothly ease the OBS stage into the currently-focused Hyprland window (to emphasise a function or line), press again to ease back to the full frame. Uses the same monitor-capture source as Auto-Frame. Requires: Hyprland + OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.

Actions.Name: Workspace → Scene
Actions.Tooltip: Bind Hyprland workspaces (or focused window classes) to OBS scenes and auto-switch the program scene when you change workspace/app. A loop guard means it only switches when the target actually changes, so it never fights a manual scene change. Press to re-sync now. Requires: Hyprland + OBS 28+ with obs-websocket v5.
